title: Optional blinking animation for PageHeader title

requirements.summary: Add a global reusable blink text animation class with reduced-motion-safe behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: A new blink animation exists in the global styles (e.g., in frontend/src/index.css) as a class that can be applied to any element.
When the user has prefers-reduced-motion enabled, the blinking animation is disabled (no blinking occurs).

file_operations.description: Define a new @keyframes-based blink animation and expose it via a simple global class name (e.g., .animate-blink) suitable for headings; add a prefers-reduced-motion media query override that disables the animation when reduced motion is requested.

requirements.summary: Extend PageHeader with an opt-in prop to apply the blink class to the title without changing existing behavior by default.
acceptanceCriteria: PageHeader accepts a new optional prop (e.g., blinkTitle?: boolean) that defaults to false.
When blinkTitle is true, the <h1> title in PageHeader uses the blink animation class and visibly blinks.
When blinkTitle is false or omitted, the title renders exactly as it does currently (no animation).

file_operations.description: Add a new optional prop (blinkTitle?: boolean, defaulting to false) and conditionally apply the global blink animation class (from frontend/src/index.css) to the title <h1> only when blinkTitle is true, preserving existing markup and styling when false/omitted.
